evidence_items.description: wasm32 cargo check passes with each wasm profile
Native cargo check still passes (no regression)
No native-only import reachable under wasm32
Drop across wasm boundary releases resources
Error values marshalled to JS-visible types
Package exports resolve for ESM and CJS
Tree shaking does not break live exports
npm install succeeds for each package

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify evidence layer catalog completeness and structure
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-wasm-qa cargo test --test wasm_qa_evidence_matrix_contract layer -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify wasm profile catalog and cfg-gated file existence
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-wasm-qa cargo test --test wasm_qa_evidence_matrix_contract profile -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify evidence item IDs are unique and well-formed
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-wasm-qa cargo test --test wasm_qa_evidence_matrix_contract evidence -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Run the ignored wasm profile compile-closure harness across the canonical browser matrix
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-wasm-cfg cargo test --test wasm_cfg_compile_invariants wasm_profile_matrix_compile_closure_holds -- --ignored --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Run the ignored native all-targets backstop after wasm cfg-gating changes
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-wasm-cfg cargo test --test wasm_cfg_compile_invariants native_all_targets_backstop_holds -- --ignored --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Run packaged bootstrap/load/reload harness in dry-run mode and verify schema-style WASM E2E bundle emission
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env HARNESS_PROFILE=packaged_bootstrap HARNESS_DRY_RUN=1 RCH_BIN=/bin/true FAULT_MATRIX_MODE=reduced bash scripts/test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh

smoke_scenarios.description: Run packaged cancellation/quiescence harness in dry-run mode and verify schema-style WASM E2E bundle emission
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; bash scripts/build_browser_core_artifacts.sh prod; env WASM_PACKAGED_CANCELLATION_DRY_RUN=1 WASM_PERF_PROFILE=core-min RCH_BIN=/bin/true bash scripts/test_wasm_packaged_cancellation_e2e.sh'

smoke_scenarios.description: Run host-bridge fetch/streams/websocket/storage harness in dry-run mode and verify schema-style WASM E2E bundle emission
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env HARNESS_PROFILE=host_bridge HARNESS_DRY_RUN=1 RCH_BIN=/bin/true FAULT_MATRIX_MODE=reduced bash scripts/test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh

smoke_scenarios.description: Run full cross-framework harness in dry-run mode with an explicit browser matrix and verify matrix metadata in emitted artifacts
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env HARNESS_PROFILE=full HARNESS_DRY_RUN=1 RCH_BIN=/bin/true FAULT_MATRIX_MODE=reduced BROWSER_MATRIX=chromium-headless,firefox-headless,webkit-headless bash scripts/test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh
